details.test: Task 1: Add two cheapest sauces under 12 with rating 4+ to cart
Task 2: Create three-sauce trio (1 hot, 2 extra hot) priced 6-12
Task 3: Buy highest-rated extra-hot 5 oz sauce, quantity 2
Task 4: Favorite lower-sodium extra-hot between Mexican and Asian cuisines
Task 5: Add sauce with birthday gift message and standard wrap to cart
Task 6: Write 5-star review mentioning smoky flavor for Smoky Dragon Habanero
Task 7: Build mixed cart of two vegan sauces (hot and extra hot) under 12
Task 8: Save gluten-free garlic sauces (hot and extra hot) under 12 to favorites
Task 9: Purchase top-rated sauce with Standard Shipping and SPICY10 promo
